scripts.uspec: {{PM}} psy db:integrity-check && cross-env APP_NAME=$npm_package_name APP_VERSION=$npm_package_version vitest --config ./spec/unit/vite.config.ts
scripts.uspec:js: cross-env APP_NAME=$npm_package_name APP_VERSION=$npm_package_version {{PM}} build:spec && cd ./dist && vitest --config ./spec/unit/vite.config.js
scripts.fspec: {{PM}} psy db:integrity-check && cross-env APP_NAME=$npm_package_name APP_VERSION=$npm_package_version vitest --config ./spec/features/vite.config.ts
scripts.fspec:js: cross-env APP_NAME=$npm_package_name APP_VERSION=$npm_package_version {{PM}} build:spec && cd ./dist && vitest --config ./spec/features/vite.config.js
scripts.fspec:visible: {{PM}} psy db:integrity-check && cross-env HEADLESS=0 vitest run --config=./spec/features/vite.config.ts
scripts.build: cross-env APP_NAME=$npm_package_name APP_VERSION=$npm_package_version echo "building $npm_package_name..." && rm -rf dist && echo "node --version" && node --version && echo "{{TSC_COMMAND}} --version" && {{TSC_COMMAND}} --version && {{TSC_COMMAND}} -p ./tsconfig.build.json && {{TSC_ALIAS_COMMAND}} -p ./tsconfig.build.json
scripts.build:spec: cross-env NODE_ENV=test APP_NAME=$npm_package_name APP_VERSION=$npm_package_version echo "building $npm_package_name..." && rm -rf dist && echo "node --version" && node --version && echo "{{TSC_COMMAND}} --version" && {{TSC_COMMAND}} --version && {{TSC_COMMAND}} --pretty -p ./tsconfig.build-spec.json && {{TSC_ALIAS_COMMAND}} -p ./tsconfig.build-spec.json && cp -r ./recordings ./dist/recordings && [ -e .env.test ] && cp .env.test ./dist/
scripts.web:dev: cross-env APP_NAME=$npm_package_name APP_VERSION=$npm_package_version NODE_ENV=development WORKER_COUNT=0 nodemon --quiet --no-stdin
scripts.worker:dev: cross-env APP_NAME=$npm_package_name APP_VERSION=$npm_package_version NODE_ENV=development WORKER_SERVICE=1 WORKER_COUNT=1 tsx ./src/worker.ts
